Entra ID::AADSTS50001: This error occurs when the resource identifier (application ID or URI) is missing from the registered applications in the tenant. Ask your tenant admin to register the application or consent to it.
Entra ID::AADSTS50011: The redirect URI sent in the request does not match any of the redirect URIs registered for the application. Ensure the redirect URI provided to the authorization endpoint matches one of the configured URIs in the application registration.
Entra ID::AADSTS700016: The application with identifier was not found in the directory. Check that you are using the correct application (client) ID and that the app is registered in the correct tenant.
